---
name: Compatibility report
about: Report success or failure on a specific macOS version or hardware
title: ''
labels: compatibility
assignees: ''

---

**macOS version tested**
e.g. macOS Tahoe 26.5.1

**Hardware**
e.g. MacBook Pro M4 Pro (2025)

**Command tested**
[ ] bypass
[ ] suppress
[ ] heal
[ ] persist
[ ] firewall
[ ] harden
[ ] audit
[ ] whitelist

**Result**
[ ] Works perfectly
[ ] Works with issues (describe below)
[ ] Does not work

**Details**
Any errors, unexpected behavior, or observations.
